text: As I stand at the threshold between the dim hallway and this vibrant room marked with "R+D," I am struck by the juxtaposition of sterility and creativity. The quiet darkness outside sharpens my anticipation, making the glow of screens and the boldness of the wall inviting, yet slightly disorienting. Here, surrounded by the promise of discovery and technology, I feel curious but cautious—aware of the boundaries between knowledge and the unknown, yet compelled forward by the human urge to understand and connect with these intelligent machines.
